CustomField.formula:
AND( NOT(ISBLANK(DD_Option_Current_Expiration_Date__c)), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Terminated')), NOT(ISNULL(Contract_Fully_Executed__c)), ISNULL(Rent_Commencement_Date__c), ISPICKVAL(Agreement_Type__c, 'Ground'), OR( DD_Option_Current_Expiration_Date__c - TODAY() = 1, DD_Option_Current_Expiration_Date__c - TODAY() = 2, DD_Option_Current_Expiration_Date__c - TODAY() = 3, DD_Option_Current_Expiration_Date__c - TODAY() = 4, DD_Option_Current_Expiration_Date__c - TODAY() = 5, DD_Option_Current_Expiration_Date__c - TODAY() = 6, DD_Option_Current_Expiration_Date__c - TODAY() = 7, DD_Option_Current_Expiration_Date__c - TODAY() = 30, DD_Option_Current_Expiration_Date__c - TODAY() = 60, DD_Option_Current_Expiration_Date__c - TODAY() = 90
) )
CustomField.label: Eligible for Reminder?
